commentary: Reliability tip: gate every rollout on p95 latency, not averages. Averages hide the pain your users feel.
New migration guide is up: moving to the Substack theme API without downtime. Took us a week to get right.
Accessibility is not a feature you bolt on at the end. Sharing the audit checklist my team uses every sprint.
Marginal Notes tooling 2.0 is live. Faster cold starts and a new plugin system. Read the launch post on our blog.
Hiring two senior backend engineers for the platform team. Remote-friendly across EU and US time zones. DM me.
We just open-sourced our internal feature-flag library. Battle-tested across three years of rollouts. Link in comments.
